title: Rosh HaAyin Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Rosh HaAyin with a Z-Score of +4.03. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Rosh HaAyin is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 13.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 27%, and the wind speed is 13.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures in Rosh HaAyin.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to heat
